---
title: "Memory vs Sleep Phases"
toc: true
date: today
author: "Natallia Halai and Angela Textor"
format: 
  html:
    
    embed-resources: true
    code-fold: true
    number-sections: true
editor: visual
editor_options:
  
  
  chunk_output_type: console
project:
  
  output-dir: output
  execute-dir: project
execute: 
  warning: false
  error: false
  freeze: true
---

:::{comment_to_self}

One NA value from participant 9 epoch 58 was replaced by N1 

:::
```{r}
#| label: library_loading
#| include: false

library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(dplyr)
library(GGally)
library(DHARMa)
library(tidyverse)

```


```{r}
#| label: data-loading
#| include: false

condition<-read_csv("data/processed/Condition_participants.csv", 
    col_types = cols(participant_id = col_factor(levels = c("1", 
        "2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7", "8", 
        "9")), Condition = col_factor(levels = c("Coffein", 
        "None"))))

all_scoring <- read_csv("data/processed/scoring_processed/all_scoring.csv", 
col_types = cols(stage = col_factor(levels = c("Wake", "N1", "N2", "N3", "REM")), digit = col_skip()))

all_olt<-read_csv("data/processed/olt_processed/all_olt.csv", 
    col_types = cols(participant = col_factor(levels = c("1", 
        "2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7", "8", 
        "9")), timepoint = col_factor(levels = c("1", 
        "2")), file = col_skip()))

all_olt$condition<-rep(condition$Condition, each=2)
all_scoring$participant<-factor(all_scoring$participant, levels=c(1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9))
all_scoring$condition<-ifelse(all_scoring$participant %in% c(1, 5, 6, 9), "Coffein", "None")

```


#Per Participant Sleep Stage Duration
```{r}
#| label: extraction-Phases

#length of each sleep stage per participant
number_stages<-table(all_scoring$participant, all_scoring$stage)
number_stages<-number_stages*30
number_stages<-data.frame(number_stages)
number_stages<-number_stages%>%
  rename(Participant=Var1, Stage=Var2, Time=Freq)

#Adding the time for Wake in 3
number_stages[number_stages$Participant==3 & number_stages$Stage=="Wake",]$Time<-2880

number_stages<-number_stages%>%
  group_by(Participant)%>%
  mutate(Time_percent=Time/sum(Time))

ggplot(number_stages, aes(x=Participant, y=Time_percent, fill=Stage))+
  geom_bar(stat="identity")+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(
    "Wake"= "lightsalmon",
    "N1"="lightgoldenrod1",
    "N2"="lightgreen",
    "N3"="lightskyblue",
    "REM"="violet"
  ))

ggplot(number_stages, aes(x=Participant, y=Time, fill=Stage))+
  geom_bar(stat="identity")+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(
    "Wake"= "lightsalmon",
    "N1"="lightgoldenrod1",
    "N2"="lightgreen",
    "N3"="lightskyblue",
    "REM"="violet"
  ))
  



```


#Per Condition Sleep Stage Duration
```{r}
number_times_condition<-table(all_scoring$condition, all_scoring$stage)*30
number_times_condition[2,1]<-number_times_condition[2,1]+2880 #adding the missing participant 3s data of Wake

number_times_condition<-data.frame(number_times_condition)

number_times_condition<-number_times_condition%>%
  rename(Condition=Var1, Stage=Var2, Time=Freq)

number_times_condition$Condition<-ifelse(number_times_condition$Condition=="None", 0, 1)
number_times_condition$Condition<-factor(number_times_condition$Condition, levels=c(0,1), labels=c("None", "Coffein"))


number_times_condition<-number_times_condition%>%
  group_by(Condition)%>%
  mutate(Time_percentage=Time/sum(Time))

ggplot(number_times_condition, aes(x=Condition, y=Time_percentage, fill=Stage))+
  geom_bar(stat="identity")+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(
    "Wake"= "lightsalmon",
    "N1"="lightgoldenrod1",
    "N2"="lightgreen",
    "N3"="lightskyblue",
    "REM"="violet"
  ))


ggplot(number_times_condition, aes(x=Condition, y=Time, fill=Stage))+
  geom_bar(stat="identity")+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(
    "Wake"= "lightsalmon",
    "N1"="lightgoldenrod1",
    "N2"="lightgreen",
    "N3"="lightskyblue",
    "REM"="violet"
  ))

t.test(Time~Condition, data = number_times_condition)
#no difference in stage times between conditions (t.test)

```



```{r}
number_stages$condition<-ifelse(number_stages$Participant %in% c(1,5,6,9), 1, 0)
number_stages$condition<-factor(number_stages$condition, levels=c(0,1), labels=c("None", "Coffein"))

t.test(Time~condition, data = subset(number_stages, Stage == "Wake"))
t.test(Time~condition, data = subset(number_stages, Stage == "N1"))
t.test(Time~condition, data = subset(number_stages, Stage == "N2"))
t.test(Time~condition, data = subset(number_stages, Stage == "N3"))

```



```{r}



```
